title: Elements Spear Plugin
description:
Minecraft Spear with magical abilities 
Epic plugin for your smp
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FbwNrwSAGLA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe><iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/h72EVxQ1REU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>🌟 Epic Magical Spears - 6 Elemental Weapons 🌟

Adds 6 powerful elemental spears with unique abilities to Minecraft! Perfect for RPG servers, PvP arenas, and adventure maps.

[__°°°°°°°°°°°°°RESOURCES PACK°°°°°°°°°°°°__](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/elements-spear-plugin-resources-pav)

SUBSCRIBE:)[**[YOUTUBE SUPPORT]**](https://youtube.com/@mine_twice?si=84nFWHQsamd-gpK9)

📋 **SPEAR ABILITIES:**

❄️ **Ice Spear** - Freezes enemies with Slowness and Mining Fatigue
🔥 **Fire Spear** - Shoots meteor projectiles with explosive damage
⚡ **Lightning Spear** - Summons lightning strikes with chain effects
☠️ **Poison Spear** - Applies Poison effect with health drain over time
💫 **Void Spear** - Teleports enemies randomly with Blindness and Weakness
❤️ **Life Spear** - Steals health from enemies and heals the user

⚡ **KEY FEATURES:**
• Grace Period system with status bar display
• Custom particle effects and sounds
• Anti-spam cooldown protection
• Configurable damage and abilities
• Permission-based access system
• Multi-language support

🎮 **PERFECT FOR:**
• RPG Servers
• PvP Arenas  
• Adventure Maps
• Survival Worlds
• Mini-game Servers

🛠 **COMMANDS:**
Use `/elementsspear` for all commands and help

🚀 **INSTALL NOW** and bring elemental warfare to your server!
